title: Spear & Jackson 8290RS Razorsharp Advance Heavy Duty Telescopic Ratchet Anvil Lopper
features: Ratchet action gives easy cutting in short steps - ideal for thicker, harder branches
PTFE coated blade for rust resistance and smooth cutting
Our simple to operate ‘twist & lock’ telescopic handles extend from 400mm to 800mm for additional reach
The handles are finished with soft-feel non-slip grips for comfort and safety during use
Grow Your Own - Great British Growing Awards 2021 Winner
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. Razorsharp Heavy Duty Telescopic Ratchet Anvil Lopper Easy Cutting in Short Steps - Ideal for Thicker, Harder branches Ideal for cutting thicker and harder branches and easily handles a branch 50mm in diameter. These loppers feature a ratchet action which provides a mechanical advantage by advancing the spring loaded cutting blade towards the anvil blade in short steps to complete the cut with a minimum of effort. Soft-feel and non-slip grips for user comfort throughout use. Extend from 710mm up to 1030mm for those harder-to-reach branches. SK5 carbon steel upper blade for lasting sharpness PTFE coated blade for rust resistance Light but strong tubular aluminium handles Soft feel, non-slip grips for comfort Locking catch for safe storage Extend from 710mm up to 1030mm Product Features Ratchet Action Cutting in Short Steps Simply open the handles to activate the ratchet, then close the handle below the cutting blade until the audible click, open again until the next click and repeat the process. Soft-Feel, Non-Slip Grips & Locking Catch The handles are finished with soft-feel non-slip grips for comfort and safety during use and also feature a locking catch for safe storage and carrying. Telescopic Reach - Extend up to 1030mm Our simple to operate ‘twist & lock’ telescopic handles extend from 400mm to 800mm for additional reach when required and are made from tubular aluminium to remain as light as possible without compromising on strength. Our Promise All Spear & Jackson products undergo rigorous quality inspection and testing. We cover against defects in manufacturing subject to wear and tear and the provision of reasonable care and maintenance. If you do have an issue with one of our products, please contact Amazon.co.uk customer services who will be happy to help.
